# generate-image-with-prompt-and-negative-prompt
Description: Generate an image using a detailed positive prompt to define desired characteristics and a negative prompt to exclude unwanted elements.
Source: project
1. Craft a detailed positive prompt that describes all desired aspects of the image, including style, subject, composition, lighting, and specific features. Be as descriptive as possible to guide the image generation process.
2. Create a negative prompt listing all elements, qualities, or defects that should be excluded from the generated image. This helps refine the output by preventing common issues or unwanted inclusions.
3. Input both the positive and negative prompts into an image generation tool. The tool will then process these instructions to produce an image that aligns with your positive description while avoiding the elements specified in the negative prompt.
